$ cat ./ted-conferences/README.md 2025 TED Conferences Built for total client control with a large component library, making full use of Webflow's Page Building experience. More control, speed to market, and lower costs. Client: TED Role: Lead Developer Agency: Whiteboard → ./open --url

TED Conferences Built for total client control with a large component library, making full use of Webflow's Page Building experience. More control, speed to market, and lower costs. Client: TED Role: Lead Developer Agency: Whiteboard → ./open --url

Modular page building controls, custom accents, SVG masks, and a system to customize the brand for each year. Client: Global Leadership Network Role: Lead Developer Agency: Whiteboard → ./open --url

Global Leadership Network Annual Summit attended by 350,000 leaders spanning 100+ countries. Modular page building controls, custom accents, SVG masks, and a system to customize the brand for each year. Client: Global Leadership Network Role: Lead Developer Agency: Whiteboard → ./open --url

The Oasis at Dreamforce A fun, colorful landing page full of custom illustrations with movement to bring them all to life. Sometimes the brief is just 'make something awesome'. Client: CaptivateIQ Role: Developer → ./open --url

$ cat ./state-of-icm-report/README.md 2025 State of ICM Report Report microsite with fluid typography, offset grid system, and smooth scroll animations. Beautiful custom illustrations and unveiling effects without letting animation get in the way. Client: CaptivateIQ Role: Developer → ./open --url

State of ICM Report Report microsite with fluid typography, offset grid system, and smooth scroll animations. Beautiful custom illustrations and unveiling effects without letting animation get in the way. Client: CaptivateIQ Role: Developer → ./open --url

Christmas Eve 2024 Tasteful, well-branded microsite with lighting tricks for a shimmering backdrop and SVG path draw-in animation. Client: Passion City Church Role: Senior Developer Agency: Whiteboard → ./open --url

The Multiplier Content hub for thought leadership. Free membership content site with access, profiles, and favoriting system using Memberstack, integrated with client's CRM. Client: CaptivateIQ Role: Developer → ./open --url

Harness Fundraising technology for nonprofits and financial institutions. Collaboration with top minds like Keegan Leary and Timothy Ricks on some fancy tricks. Client: Harness Role: Developer → ./open --url

Kalderos Annual Report 8-bit inspired annual report. Single-scroll, multi-chapter experience with custom illustrations and a whole lot of custom JavaScript. Plus a fun easter egg. Client: Kalderos Role: Developer → ./open --url
